title: Minecraft Earth Sheep
description: A resourcepack that adds all the variations of sheep from Minecraft Earth to the base game.
body:
![All Sheep Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73319f63ec4e85ed00fa3d5d2d22cd564a94fe9d.png)

You know all those cool variation of sheep from Minecraft Earth, that aren't in the base game? Well this resourcepack fixes that. All sheep featuring in MC Earth now have a place in your Minecraft world.

The sheep can all be found in their respective biome.

The biomes the sheep can be found in are the following:


<details>
<summary>Default/Patched Sheep</summary>

![Default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3210b0d629284ecaf8ac188a70d81ed6f83c3f02.png)

![Patched](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ee07504748dac2e971a96d711bf53f9a04c1cea.png)

Both have a 50% chance to spawn in any biome that doesn't have a different sheep texture
</details>

<details>
<summary>Horned Sheep</summary>

![Horned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26eb0954a50ea7a76a391374e9de385d57a1f507.png)

Snowy Slopes, Jagged Peaks, Frozen Peaks, Grove
</details>

<details>
<summary>Rocky Sheep</summary>
  
![Rocky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa12d5a18040222e6e2e71287309e578ddbe37af.png)

Stony Shore, Stony Peaks
</details>

<details>
<summary>Flecked Sheep</summary>

![Flecked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c17d1e296c285d3bfd007c8715f164ec7051d61f.png)

Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga
</details>

<details>
<summary>Inky Sheep</summary>

![Inky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc8262eaa2a85482b047f389be00453f982d91e5.png)

Birch Forest
</details>

<details>
<summary>Fuzzy Sheep</summary>

![Fuzzy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cb4f0da74dd25304852e7d5b7436481abaee0a1.png)

Snowy Plains, Snowy Taiga, Ice Spikes, Frozen River, Frozen Ocean, Deep Frozen Ocean, Snowy Beach, Taiga
</details>

<details>
<summary>Long Nose Sheep</summary>

![Long Nose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbd195951917f6ef5a5026e6e516bd370f595ee0.png)

Badlands, Eroded Badlands, Wooded Badlands, Desert, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna
</details>

<details>
<summary>Rainbow Sheep</summary>

![Rainbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/190660d2baebfbcae018a9359ab900a56be628ae.png)

By renaming any sheep to "Rainbow"
</details>
